sentiment.reasoning: An investor day focused on strategy is generally a neutral to slightly positive event aimed at improving market sentiment.

headlines.headline: Kelvik Power revises long-term strategy with focus on automated logistics

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
